what_it_does: A compiled/generated JavaScript bundle (~256KB, ~6970 lines) of the ConceptV design system: a leading /* @ds-bundle */ JSON header declares the namespace (ConceptVDesignSystem_c8f43c), the exported components (Avatar, Badge, Button, Card, Glyphic, Input, Modal, Segmented, Stepper, Switch, Tabs, plus the core ContainmentTree, DiagramSolver, RenderType/CoreTypes, Slide/Archetypes) with their source paths, and a sourceHashes map of every app/ai/canvas/core source file that fed the build. The body is the bundled implementation of those components and the engine.
observations: Marked compiled output; the consuming CLAUDE.md explicitly says '_ds_bundle.js / _ds_manifest.json / _adherence.oxlintrc.json are compiled output — never hand-edit' and that the bundle is stale mid-turn.
Header is a machine manifest: format:3, a hashed namespace, a components[] list (name + sourcePath), and sourceHashes for content-addressed staleness detection.
Component sourcePaths show several exports share one source file (RenderType + CoreTypes from core/RenderType.jsx; Slide + Archetypes from core/Slide.jsx).

sourceHashes enumerates the app surface: ai-registry/seed/capabilities, host-runtime/serializer, and many canvases (AIStudio, Architecture, Bridge, Build, Colors, Components, Icons, Imagery, Inbox, Overview, Patterns, Registry, RegistryInspector, Settings, Templates, …).
File size read out at exactly 262144 bytes (256KB) — likely a generated/packed artifact.
Not read line-by-line: treated as a generated blob per the project's never-hand-edit rule.
standouts: The bundle carries a content-hash manifest of every source file that built it — drift/staleness is detectable by hashing sources against the header.
It is the single packed runtime home for both the leaf components and the core generative engine (the two solvers + the RenderType/Slide bridge).
conventions: Content-addressed staleness via sourceHashes — registry-style provenance baked into the output.
Single-bundle distribution: consumers import the components/engine from this one packed namespace.
concerns: Compiled blob — not human-reviewable in source form; its truth lives in the source files it was built from.
Bundle is known-stale mid-turn (per charter), so reading it can misrepresent current source state.
No file-local concerns can be asserted beyond that it is generated output.
notes: Generated 256KB design-system bundle packing the leaf components plus the core engine; never hand-edit — it's built from the source files listed in its @ds-bundle sourceHashes header.
questions: What build step emits this (the @ds-bundle format:3 + sourceHashes structure) and how is staleness checked against the header at runtime?
Why are some exports (CoreTypes, Archetypes) co-bundled from another component's source file — are they re-exports or distinct entities?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches: it is the compiled distribution bundle of the design system's components and engine, exactly as its header declares.
intention_signals: Inferred: the bundle is meant to be the single deployable runtime of the unified design system, with a self-describing manifest header so consumers and tooling can know exactly which sources and components it contains and detect when it has drifted from its inputs — the compiled embodiment of the 'defined once, referenced everywhere' principle.
novelty: Embedding a full sourceHashes provenance manifest and a typed components/sourcePaths list as a JSON header comment inside the compiled bundle is more deliberate than an ordinary minified output.
contribution: Brings the packed runtime artifact and, distinctively, its self-describing @ds-bundle manifest — the authoritative list of which components/engine exports exist and the content hashes of the sources that produced them, a provenance/staleness signal a fused system could keep.
summary_for_embedding: Compiled ~256KB ConceptV design-system JS bundle packing the leaf components (Avatar, Badge, Button, Card, Glyphic, Input, Modal, Segmented, Stepper, Switch, Tabs) and the core engine (ContainmentTree, DiagramSolver, RenderType, Slide), fronted by an @ds-bundle JSON header with namespace, exported-components list, and per-source content hashes.
intention_for_embedding: Provide the single deployable runtime of the unified design system with a self-describing provenance manifest so tooling can know its contents and detect drift from its source files.
